description: Launch Xcode and open developer tools.
author: colorfulDots

commands.name: Open Project in Xcode
commands.description: Open the current project folder in Xcode

commands.name: Clear Derived Data
commands.target:
tell application "Terminal" to do script "rm -rf ~/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData"
tell application "Terminal" to activate
commands.description: Delete Xcode's DerivedData folder to force a clean build

commands.name: Xcode Build
commands.target:
tell application "Terminal" to do script "cd {{workspace_path}} && xcodebuild build"
tell application "Terminal" to activate
commands.description: Run xcodebuild to compile the current project
